titleStmt.title: SII 27.31: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 31. (A.R. No. 307 of 1937-38.) GOLLAPALLE, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying near the Śiva temple.

The record refers itself to the reign of Nūrmaḍi Taila, who is also called Vishṇuvardhana, ruling from Kalyāṇa. Much of the writing is damaged and the date is lost. But as the record can be palaeographically assigned only to the 12th century the king referred to might be Taila III, though the language of the inscription appears to question its genuineness.
It registers gifts of lands, and a flower-garden for the worship and offerings to a deity (name lost). The gift was entrusted to Nāgarāśi-paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvī vallabhaṁ mahārā
jādhirāja paramēsvara viṣṇavarddhana
menisida nūrmmaḍi tailapadēvana rājyamo
ppi kalyāṇa bu na radalu rā
jyaṁgeyuttamire sakavarisaṁga
damaged
mara siṁgha The following
damaged
nāgarāsi(śi) pa(ṁ)ṇḍitaṁgaṁ ddhārā
pūrikaṁ māḍikoṭṭadatti mosali ma
ḻḻūra baḍagaṇadeneyalu nāgarāsi(śi)ge dēvasta
nakke keya ma 2 neveddake gadde 2 trisa(ṁ)ndegaṁ pū
je punasukāra hūvina toṁṭṭa mo(ṁ)ndu 1 lu
puvaṁ dāreneṟidu dēvara saniddānadalu
koṭṭubiṭṭadatti ca(ṁ)ndrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ yi dha
rmmavaṁ keḍasidavaru svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yōhaThe letter yō seems to have been engraved above vā in smaller siśe.
rēnu(tu) vasu(ṁ)ndhara saṣṭi varusa sahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatēkrimi yi ślōkārttamaṁ kēḷaṟiyada
(da)varu vāṇarāsi kurukṣētraṁ śrī gaṁgā
nadiyalu sāyara vidvāṁsabrāhmaṇaraṁ sā
yira surabhikavila dhēnuvaṁ sāyiratapōdha
narumaṁ naḷida pātaka
dalu mahābramaha
tyadalu maṟubhavari
llade narakadalu kuṁbhīpātakada
lu krimikīṭarāgipparu . siva siva sivā nārasiṁha .
Digital edition of SII 27.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
